response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, software architecture, and testing, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ experience, showing less than a year of professional C++ usage. His technical expertise is heavily concentrated in Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, which does not align well with the low-level compute infrastructure needs of a C++ heavy cloud platform technical leadership role.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and launching large-scale distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic.
Strong background in establishing engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and organizing coding dojos.
Demonstrated ownership and architectural capability as a founder (GISCollective) and Staff Engineer.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing only about 7 months professionally.
Core expertise centers around web technologies and DLang rather than core cloud compute technologies or hardware architecture.
Missing direct experience in a formal technical leadership role specifically mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers.
